frames.title: From paralysis to one honest signal
frames.summary: The private core loop is usable end to end without an account, backend, or AI dependency.

frames.title: From self-attestation to a recoverable experiment
frames.summary: The task-first compiler, frozen criterion, honest evidence funnel, linked decisions, and recoverable local workspace are shipped.

frames.title: From activity receipts to reasoned belief lineage
frames.summary: Structured assumptions now compile to safe executable probes, barrier-aware pacing, directional interpretation, persisted decisions, and deterministic lineage synthesis.

frames.title: Pending evolution
frames.summary: Mutation will be selected from observed evidence, not predetermined.
